loop1.title: Events KPI Strip
loop1.note: Showing total event counts and worst deviations per panel member; aggregate current (amps) and voltage stats (vAvg/vMax/vMin) are not measured by this panel's aggregate table.

loop1.title: AI Summary
loop1.note: Showing panel aggregate narrative; per-member roster data is populated for live feeders (UPS-01 to UPS-04, BPDB-01/02). Supply feeders (Solar/Transformer) are dark and omitted from the roster.

loop1.title: Event Timeline at {period}
loop1.note: Showing event counts and worst deviations for 6 active feeders; 2 feeders (UPS-05, UPS-06) are dark (no data) and honest-blank.

loop1.title: Current Distribution at {period}
loop1.note: Showing current draw per outgoing feeder (current_avg). Per-phase voltage, unbalance, and neutral metrics are not measured for this panel aggregate and are omitted.

loop1.title: Other Panels Event at {period}
loop1.note: Showing per-panel event counts and aggregates for 6 active feeders; 2 feeders (UPS-05, UPS-06) are dark and honest-blank.
